Name: Anby's Namecard
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Anby's Mindscape Cinema "Well-Disciplined"
Desc2:
A card with the image of a Cunning Hare on it.
The person who made this card used a special dye that allows it to glow in the dark. This is handy for those times when you need to find your way in the pitch black. But be careful, because it's also very noticeable in the light. [/INST] A card with the image of a Cunning Hare on it. The person who made this card used a special dye that allows it to glow in the dark. This is handy for those times when you need to find your way in the dark. But be careful, because it's also very noticeable in the light.
